title: Angry Bird Ear / Angry Birds Ear
about:
Angry Bird Ear or Angry Birds Ear , also known as Angry Bird Listening , I Repeat Back Anything That's Said to Me and I Am All Ears MF , is a reaction image meme depicting a red bird from the video game series Angry Birds (named Red) with a large human hand and ear with a raised eyebrow, signifying that he's listening to someone. The graphic originally comes from an app called Talking Red , similar to Talking Tom , that featured the red bird sitting on green grass, where he would supposedly repeat back something the user would say, listening with the hand and ear image.

The meme initially spread under a different name and usage in 2024 before being primarily used as a reaction image on TikTok as a sticker in comment sections during late 2025 and early 2026. As the meme spread on TikTok in early 2026, users began creating numerous variations of the image, often using AI.
origin:
The original image of the red Angry Birds character listening with a human ear and hand comes from an app called Talking Red , in which users attempted to get the bird to repeat back phrases said into the microphone. [2] The app is purportedly lost media and first appeared online on mid-to-late March 2024, with the app being recreated shortly after. [8]

The app and graphic of the red bird notably went around in late March 2024 in a precursor meme trend called "I Repeat Back Anything That's Said to Me" where users would attempt to get the bird to repeat their statements, with the bird constantly replying with the same sound.

According to some, [1] the original comes from a since-deleted Twitter / X user from South America who used the app in a viral video posted sometime in March 2024 in which he continuously tried to get the bird to repeat his words, with it eventually referencing the August 12 2036, The Heat Death Of The Universe meme when the man mocked him by making the same sound.

It was reposted to YouTube on June 27th, 2024, receiving over 577,000 views and 15,000 likes in two years.

Another variant of the meme was posted to YouTube on March 23rd, 2024, titled "I repeat back anything that's said to me full meme," which garnered over 1.1 million views and 42,000 likes in a similar timeframe.

The image of the red Angry Bird with the hand and ear was then uploaded to Tenor [3] by user endmysufferingrn on May 2nd, 2024, under the title "I Am All Ears Mf Meme."
